Higher Education Council Formatted CV

Rate Us

Short CV

Betül Büyükgöz completed her undergraduate education at Yeditepe University, Department of Sociology (English). Having studied Spanish at the Cervantes Institute in Istanbul, Büyükgöz worked on Spanish teaching in various educational institutions.
